description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a rich, medium-brown finish and a sturdy, modern design. The tabletop is adorned with a long, light-colored fabric runner featuring subtle leaf patterns, adding a decorative touch. The table is supported by two wide, angled legs on each side, connected by a horizontal stretcher near the base for added stability. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the table a natural and elegant appearance. The runner drapes over both shorter ends of the table, with the leaf motif more prominent on one side. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for communal or dining use in urban environments.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden table with a decorative leaf-patterned fabric runner and wide, angled legs. The table has a natural wood grain finish and a modern, robust design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angled legs, horizontal stretcher, and the wavy edge of the fabric runner on the tabletop.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the table and the runner, with the wood grain and solid leg structure visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the opposite side of the angled legs and the runner's edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the runner's leaf pattern more visible, and the solid leg structure apparent.
attribute_number_of_legs: two wide angled supports with a horizontal stretcher
